visual_description: A man with dark hair in a pink plaid shirt stands facing a man in a blue checkered shirt, gesturing with his right hand as he speaks; behind them a beige wall holds a framed picture and a wall sconce. The pink‑shirted man leans slightly forward and uses expressive hand movements, while the blue‑shirted man stands with his back to the camera.
audio_description: The pink‑shirted man speaks in a steady, conversational tone, while the other man listens quietly. The audio is clear and contains normal dialogue.
